hyperedges.label: GitOps Bootstrap Dependency Chain: crds → controllers → network → apps
Certificate provisioning: Cloudflare token + certadmin user + Let's Encrypt → TLS certs on NAS/Unifi
Cluster provisioning: Terraform modules provision Proxmox VMs with Talos OS and bootstrap FluxCD
